entry.condition: Bull Signal when price remains below the smoothed lower FVG boundary for at least 5 bars, the 50-bar signal cooldown has passed, and volume confirmation passes if enabled. Super Bull when the wick pushes beyond the lower boundary by the configured super threshold.
entry.default_threshold: Lower FVG boundary touch/reversion; Super threshold 15% wick extension

confirmation.condition: FVG channel is built from unmitigated bullish and bearish fair value gaps, smoothed over 20 bars, with optional volume confirmation using volume greater than average volume times multiplier.
confirmation.default_threshold: Smoothing length 20; volume lookback 20; volume multiplier 1.0 when enabled

take_profit.condition: Normal signals use fixed percentage take profit or optional Fibonacci channel target. Super signals use larger take profit.
take_profit.default_threshold: Normal TP 1.0%; Super TP 2.0%; optional Fib 0.236 / 0.5 / 0.786

stop_loss.condition: Stop loss is placed against the entry direction using the normal or super stop setting.
